name: Papero Aspiratorino
lore:
Lore of Papero Aspiratorino
                                    


Papero Aspiratorino is a silver duck with a normal beak and legs, but with the body of a vacuum cleaner.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Papero Aspiratorino, Anonucci Poppa Troppa. El Peperito Aspiratorito.
Translated (English)
Papero Aspiratorino, Anonucci Poppa Troppa. The Peperito Aspiratorito.
